title: HMCTS management information - November 2025
body: "These documents provide the latest management information on workload and timeliness for the period from November 2024 to November 2025 for our civil and family courts, and tribunals.               HMCTS management information (accessible version) - November 2024 to November 2025    CSV, 8.1 KB  View online                   HMCTS management information - November 2024 to November 2025    MS Excel Spreadsheet, 58.1 KB     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email hmctsforms@justice.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.     "
